MAGI iter 3 FINAL (checkpoint2): veredicto 'HOLD' degraded=True.
Causa raiz inferida: transient-infra (agent degraded repite).
Safety valve INV-11 exhausted tras 3 iter.

Escalando al usuario per INV-11 + INV-18:

Estado plan D:
- Iteraciones: 3
- Findings residuales: 0

Opciones per INV-0 (user authority):
- (a) override: Override INV-0 (user authority). requires --reason; audit artifact written.
- (b) retry: Re-invocar MAGI una iter mas (safety valve +1). consume iter extra; INV-0 override del INV-11.
- (c) abandon: Exit 8 (v0.1 behavior) + artefactos para review manual. default en non-TTY.
- (d) abandon: Exit 8 (v0.1 behavior) + artefactos para review manual. default en non-TTY.

¿Cuál?
